meaning: n.海滨(胜地),滨海城镇,海边adj.海边的,海滨的
examples: I had a grand day out at the seaside.
I went to spend a few days at the seaside.
I collect shells and interesting seaside items.
Sun loungers had a lot less competition for a seaside spot in Hammamet this summer.
The Galle International Stadium, to give it its full title, is a much-admired seaside venue.
